BaselineMetadata.description: Identity and provenance for a baseline.

name.description: Human-readable baseline name, displayed in CLI output and reports.
name.title: Name
name.markdownDescription: Human-readable baseline name, displayed in CLI output and reports.

version.description: Semver-style baseline version, independent of tool releases.
version.title: Version
version.markdownDescription: Semver-style baseline version, independent of tool releases.

description.description: Optional longer description; surfaced by `cle list-baselines --verbose`.
description.title: Description
description.markdownDescription: Optional longer description; surfaced by `cle list-baselines --verbose`.

url.description: Optional homepage / source URL for the baseline.
url.title: Url
url.markdownDescription: Optional homepage / source URL for the baseline.

BaselineMetadata.title: BaselineMetadata
BaselineMetadata.markdownDescription: Identity and provenance for a baseline.

GroupedRequirement.description:
A topical parent that owns leaf `Requirement`s sharing one fix surface.

Carries no own `statement` — the verifiable claims live on the
nested subs. The parent's `title` is the topical heading (e.g. an
ASVS section name like "Browser Security Mechanism Headers"). One
verifier runs against the parent + all its subs in a single agent
call and emits findings tagged with which sub(s) each violates.

id.description: Stable identifier unique within the baseline.
id.title: Id
id.markdownDescription: Stable identifier unique within the baseline.

title.description: Topical heading shared by every sub-requirement (e.g. the ASVS section name). Required for grouped entries because the parent carries no statement of its own.
title.title: Title
title.markdownDescription: Topical heading shared by every sub-requirement (e.g. the ASVS section name). Required for grouped entries because the parent carries no statement of its own.

category.description: Optional grouping label for reporters and baseline documentation. Free-form.
category.title: Category
category.markdownDescription: Optional grouping label for reporters and baseline documentation. Free-form.

sub_requirements.description: Leaf requirements verified together as one cohesive review. Each sub carries its own `id` and `statement`; sub ids must be unique within the parent (enforced by `_unique_sub_ids`).
sub_requirements.title: Sub Requirements
sub_requirements.markdownDescription: Leaf requirements verified together as one cohesive review. Each sub carries its own `id` and `statement`; sub ids must be unique within the parent (enforced by `_unique_sub_ids`).

GroupedRequirement.title: GroupedRequirement
GroupedRequirement.markdownDescription:
A topical parent that owns leaf `Requirement`s sharing one fix surface.

Carries no own `statement` — the verifiable claims live on the
nested subs. The parent's `title` is the topical heading (e.g. an
ASVS section name like "Browser Security Mechanism Headers"). One
verifier runs against the parent + all its subs in a single agent
call and emits findings tagged with which sub(s) each violates.

Requirement.description:
A single verifiable security requirement.

Used both as a top-level baseline entry (flat) and as the leaf shape
nested inside `GroupedRequirement.sub_requirements`. Severity is
not on the requirement — the verifier assigns it per finding based
on the observed gap (impact, exposure, exploitability).

id.description: Stable identifier unique within the baseline.
id.title: Id
id.markdownDescription: Stable identifier unique within the baseline.

title.description: Short human-readable label. Optional — ASVS-style requirements have only a statement, while custom baselines typically supply a title for easier scanning.
title.title: Title
title.markdownDescription: Short human-readable label. Optional — ASVS-style requirements have only a statement, while custom baselines typically supply a title for easier scanning.

statement.description: The verifiable requirement, written as a positive assertion.
statement.title: Statement
statement.markdownDescription: The verifiable requirement, written as a positive assertion.

category.description: Optional grouping label for reporters and baseline documentation. Free-form.
category.title: Category
category.markdownDescription: Optional grouping label for reporters and baseline documentation. Free-form.

Requirement.title: Requirement
Requirement.markdownDescription:
A single verifiable security requirement.

Used both as a top-level baseline entry (flat) and as the leaf shape
nested inside `GroupedRequirement.sub_requirements`. Severity is
not on the requirement — the verifier assigns it per finding based
on the observed gap (impact, exposure, exploitability).

version.description: Baseline file schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.
version.title: Version
version.markdownDescription: Baseline file schema version. Bumped on breaking changes.
